INTROS ;

NOTES ;
1 　the original message will always remain unchanged for these bots, simply in any pov
2 　as with all of my bots, user must be 18 + even if there is no nsfw
3 　i am not responsible for what the bot may say past the initial message
4 　misgendering, broken text, repetitive messages, incorrect memory, or out of character messages are due to issues with the LLM that i cannot fix
5 　intros use pronouns macros instead of he/she/they, because i dislike using "you"
6 　the bot is vaguely aware of Ruth and Dave's existence, but neither of them are listed as dead anymore (for those who want to play as either of them)
7 　mildly tested ﹒ all of the intros are written from the bot's perspective, with the exception of the old (and rewritten) first messages
